Actors: Sam Heughan / Graham McTavish

Introduction
    Men in Kilts: A Roadtrip with Sam and Graham is a TV series starring Sam Heughan and Graham McTavish. Three men in Kilts review popular culture in a humorous send-up of internet review shows.

details.Production Co: Boardwalk Pictures , Makeshift Film Group , Sony Pictures Television
